LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED ABOUT ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS IN THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER IN PRIVATE PRACTICE AND A FAMILY FRIEND. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. IT IS UP FOR THE JURORS TO CONCLUDE WHETHER AGE COMBINED WITH THE PRIMA FACIE CASE WAS A PRETEXT FOR AGE DISCRMINATION. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTION WAS OVERRULED. MR. ROGERS IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICHARD M ROGERS, TEL. NO. 981-9788 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROSE-ELLEN HEINZ FAIRGRIEVE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3845 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED ABOUT ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS IN THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER IN PRIVATE PRACTICE AND A FAMILY FRIEND. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. IT IS UP FOR THE JURORS TO CONCLUDE WHETHER AGE COMBINED WITH THE PRIMA FACIE CASE WAS A PRETEXT FOR AGE DISCRMINATION. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTION WAS OVERRULED. Mr. Rogers is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Seal Records

ATTY. ROSE-ELLEN HEINZ FAIRGRIEVE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3845 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
